title: Runexehelper.exe
html:
Runexehelper.exe

Launcher process

Execute

Executes arbitrary code

runexehelper.exe {PATH_ABSOLUTE:.exe}

Launches the specified exe. Prerequisites: (1) diagtrack_action_output environment variable must be set to an existing, writable folder; (2) runexewithargs_output.txt file cannot exist in the folder indicated by the variable. — MITRE: T1218 — Privileges: User
